subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of that luminous and divine Branch! Thy detailed letter was read, and concerning the trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بقیه ذلک الفرع النورانی الرحمانی نامه مفصل شما قرائت گردید از بلایای
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
